title: pyrrosia pekinensis
intro: Pyrrosia pekinensis, also known as the Chinese shield fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in East Asia and used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pyrrosia pekinensis include reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and relieving symptoms of respiratory diseases like bronchitis and asthma. Pyrrosia pekinensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed after being dried or fresh, and also used topically in the form of ointments or poultices.
